questionHtml:
A pair of alleles controls the secretion of antigens corresponding to blood group in saliva. Examine the pedigree chart.

[Source: © International Baccalaureate Organization 2019]

 

Based on this pedigree chart, which best describes the allele conferring antigen secretion in saliva?

A. Dominant

B. Recessive

C. Sex-linked

D. Co-dominant

meta.title: A pair of alleles controls the secretion of antigens corresponding to blood group in saliva. Examine the pedigree chart. [Source: © International Baccalaureate Organization 2019] B
